_metadata.description: State media outlet classification database for SalientSignal MVP. Each entry maps a domain to its country of origin, audience type (DOMESTIC/INTERNATIONAL/DIASPORA), and ownership status. FVEY (US, GB, CA, AU, NZ) outlets are EXCLUDED by hard rule.

schema.domain: lowercase canonical domain (no protocol, no www)
schema.is_state_owned: true if directly owned/funded by state
schema.is_state_aligned: true if editorially aligned but not directly owned
